title: helichrysum panormitanum subsp. stramineum
intro: Helichrysum panormitanum subsp. stramineum, commonly known as the Sardinian strawflower or Sardinian immortelle, is a plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum panormitanum subsp. stramineum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or topical applications, such as creams and oils, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
